enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Oh Ringa Ringa is about celebration and joy, capturing a lively atmosphere that encourages dancing and enjoyment.

How does this song fit into the plot of 7am Arivu?

This song is featured during a festive moment in the movie, showcasing the characters' happiness and camaraderie.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features talented singers like Benny Dayal, Jerry John, Roshan, and Suchitra.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Oh Ringa Ringa was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, known for his energetic and catchy tunes.

When was the song released?

The song was released on September 17, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oh Ringa Ringa, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the joyous moments in the movie 7am Arivu. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and celebration, making it a perfect anthem for parties. The collaboration of talented singers brings a lively spirit that resonates with the audience. Overall, the song encapsulates the essence of fun and togetherness, inviting everyone to join in the dance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oh Ringa Ringa from 7am Arivu is an electrifying dance number that perfectly captures the vibrant energy of celebration. Featuring a unique collaboration of talented singers like Benny Dayal and Suchitra, this song is sure to get you on your feet. With Harrish Jeyaraj's infectious beats and Pa Vijay's catchy lyrics, it's a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Everybody talks about a cool style. Rana, do you know me? Follow me, please step it up, step it up right on the beat. Do a ooh aak aah, do a ooh aak aah, do a ooh aak aah.

Hey rocka, maafee, does everybody want to date maafee? Hey rocka, maafee, give it a date, maagee. Oh ringa ringa, jammaaikalaam gang. Ye binga binga, hip hop song. Oh, you all come in front, we are a thousand flowers. Oh mind, oh mind, we are all together, every day is a celebration of friendship.
[Hey, come come, do you remember me? Keep dancing, keep dancing. Hey, come come, are you sleeping? Take it, take it.] (2)
Oh ringa ringa, jammaaikalaam gang. Ye binga binga, hip hop song. Oh, you all come in front, we are a thousand flowers.
Hey, Iyle iyle, our life is like a train, this is a style that doesn't stop.
Oi oyle oyle, oh oyle, the joy is all in our hands. A life without freedom is just a jail, in this world, we are all together.
Jump a lot, don't hold back, understand everything, learn from mistakes. (Hey, come come...) (2)
Aaa aaka aaka aah, Iyle aaka aaka ka aah, Iyle. Aaa aaka aaka aah, Iyle aah aaaa..
Hey, we gathered together, holding hands, singing together, all our hearts are united.
Hey, something new has happened, in a moment it has changed, every day is a celebration for us.
Life is a light, it's a dance that keeps going. When you feel high, it's a rush.
East Africa, my friend. [Hey rocka maafee... does everybody want to date maafee... give it a date, maafee.]

Oh ringa ringa, jammaaikalaam gang. Ye binga binga, hip hop song. Oh, you all come in front, we are a thousand flowers. Oh mind, oh mind, we are all together, every day is a celebration of friendship.
[Hey, come come, do you remember me? Rocka maafee, rocka maafee. Hey, come come, are you sleeping? Take it, take it.] (2)
